name: run_modeling_command_smoke
description: Verify run_modeling_command's full pipeline: make_editable on a primitive cube → subdivide(1) → optimize. Each op produces a known polygon-count change; assertions verify the math worked.

args.script:
import c4d
doc = c4d.documents.GetActiveDocument()
for n in ['ModelingCmdCube']:
    o = doc.SearchObject(n)
    if o: o.Remove()
cg = c4d.BaseObject(c4d.Ocube)
cg.SetName('ModelingCmdCube')
doc.InsertObject(cg)
c4d.EventAdd()
print('seed primitive cube placed')

import c4d
doc = c4d.documents.GetActiveDocument()
o = doc.SearchObject('ModelingCmdCube')
if o: o.Remove()
c4d.EventAdd()
print('teardown ok')
